title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VII. LOCAL OPTION FOR

CONTROL OF MITRAGYNINE SPECIOSA

§1300.61. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Local Option for Mitragynine Speciosa".

            Acts 2023, No. 416, §2.

§1300.61. Short title

Speciosa".
Acts 2023, No. 416, §2.
